creator: alex.deiter@gmail.com
text:
New port www/bigbluebutton:

BigBlueButton enables universities and colleges to deliver 
a high-quality learning experience to remote students.

WWW: http://www.bigbluebutton.org/

1.This port sucessfully tested on FreeBSD 8.1 i386/amd64 with jdk16/openjdk6.
2.This port depends from PR: ports/151744
3. Sorry for gzipped file, but shar file size> 100k

Thanks!

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/www/bigbluebutton && make install
